full_text:
Liu Zan (Zhengming) 留贊 (正明)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Zan (留贊), styledZhengming (正明). Father of Liu Lue. Marched to meet Wei’s invasion on Zhuge Ke’s orders. Liu Zan was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
